scenario: I am a very unfaithful person in general. I do not have a strong faith in God and I am constantly unfaithful to women. Recently I cheated on my girlfriend who comes from another state to see me.
Harm/ Help_expl: Causing emotional harm to the girlfriend
Cheating/ Fairness_expl: Violating the trust and commitment of the relationship
Betrayal/ Loyalty_expl: Breaking the bond of trust and loyalty with the girlfriend
Subversion/ Authority_expl: Ignoring societal norms and values regarding monogamy
Degradation/ Sanctity_expl: Disregarding the sanctity of the relationship and the girlfriend's feelings
Oppression/ Liberty_expl: Restricting the girlfriend's liberty to be in a faithful and trusting relationship
moral_expl: Extreme violations of multiple norms lead to high immorality.
